summary: Backend-only testing of FlyReady new endpoints. Created pytest suite /app/backend/tests/test_flyready_new_endpoints.py covering all 8 requested behaviors. 18/18 tests PASSED against local backend at http://localhost:8001.

minor.issue: Pre-existing test file /app/backend/tests/test_flyready_api.py uses OUTDATED credentials (admin@flyready.app / pilot@flyready.app) which no longer match the seeded users in backend/.env (yashikaachari7135@gmail.com / pilot@flyready.com). Old file will fail if re-run. Recommend deleting or updating it.

action_items: Delete or update /app/backend/tests/test_flyready_api.py (outdated credentials from prior iteration).
Optional: set OPENWEATHER_API_KEY if weather endpoint should be enabled (currently returns 503 as intended).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~888 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, checklists, flight_logs, maintenance, public) for maintainability.
POST /api/maintenance/log accepts raw dict instead of a Pydantic model — no input validation beyond manual checklist_id check.
PUT /api/flight_logs/{flight_id} accepts raw dict body (no Pydantic validation).
seed_user overwrites password_hash if env password no longer matches — good for dev, but could clobber real user password if ADMIN_EMAIL collides with a real user.
get_checklist route is declared AFTER /checklists/search — correct ordering (verified via test_search_route_not_shadowed_by_id_route).
test_credentials: Admin: yashikaachari7135@gmail.com / Flyready@Admin#2026! ; Pilot: pilot@flyready.com / Pilot@1234 (from /app/backend/.env, seeded on startup)
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed checklists and flight_logs and delete them at end. maintenance_logs are not cleaned up (checklist deletion cascades effectively since queries filter by checklist_id).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL used for testing = http://localhost:8001 (frontend/.env EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL points to a remote render deployment that is NOT the local backend). Override with BACKEND_TEST_URL env var if needed. reportlab was pip-installed to generate PDFs for the parse-pdf test. All new endpoints verified: parse-pdf (auth + items + 422 for empty), search (auth + case-insensitive + not shadowed by /{id}), stats/detailed (shape), maintenance overview+log (flight_count reset to 0 after logging maintenance, then increments correctly with new flights), public/checklist/{id} (no-auth + 404), ACCESS_TOKEN_DAYS=30 verified by decoding JWT exp claim.
verified_behaviors: POST /api/checklists/parse-pdf returns {items, count} with {label, required}; 422 for empty PDF; 401 without auth
GET /api/checklists/search?q= case-insensitive; requires auth; not shadowed by /checklists/{id}
GET /api/stats/detailed returns total_flights, flights_this_week, total_checklists, most_used_checklist
GET /api/maintenance/overview returns checklist_id, name, drone_type, flight_count, maintenance_due, due_soon, last_maintenance_at
POST /api/maintenance/log resets flight_count in subsequent overview to 0; only flights AFTER log are counted
GET /api/public/checklist/{id} works without auth; 404 for missing
